sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (value Float64, time DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (5.0, now()), (10.0, now() + interval 1 second), (15.0, now() + interval 2 seconds);
SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedAvg(10)(value, time) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET value = value * 2 WHERE time = now();
SELECT average(exp_smooth) AS avg_smooth FROM (SELECT time, exponentialTimeDecayedAvg(10)(value, time) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data);
